fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Date of Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the change.

fields.name: Time of Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time of the change.

fields.name: Contract Part
fields.tooltip: Specifies the part of the contract that was changed.

fields.name: Field Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the field that was modified.

fields.name: Old Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contents of the modified field before the change takes place.

fields.name: New Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contents of the modified field after the change has taken place.

fields.name: Type of Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of change on the contract.

fields.name: Service Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item on the service contract line, for which a log entry was created.

fields.name: Serv. Contract Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the service contract line for which a log entry was created.
